subject: feat(pwa): close remaining gaps from synctone comparison
body:
Fresh comparison against synctone identified 6 remaining items:

- apple-touch-icon: <link rel="apple-touch-icon"> for iOS home screen
- Favicon: <link rel="icon"> tags (48px, 192px) for browser tabs
- noscript: styled fallback for JS-disabled browsers
- CSP: migrated from <meta> to Vercel response header (stronger —
  adds frame-src: none, object-src: none, base-uri: self)
- Icon rewrites: explicit Vercel rewrites for /favicon.png and
  /assets/images/ to prevent catch-all serving HTML
- PWA diagnostics: new "PWA" tab in DebugPill with active checks
  (manifest fetch + validation, icon checks, SW status, HTTPS,
  standalone mode, beforeinstallprompt)

Tags: pwa, security, debug, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-alignment
Semver: minor
